title: crotalaria trifoliastrum
intro: Crotalaria trifoliastrum, also known as the yellow rattle, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria trifoliastrum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its use as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
